title: Optional hosted SPARQL endpoint
context: An optional hosted SPARQL endpoint would make the graph directly queryable; it depends on steward hosting. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Stand up an optional hosted SPARQL endpoint over the published graph (dependent on steward hosting).
acceptanceCriteria: A SPARQL endpoint serves the published assertions with their provenance.
Endpoint is read-only, collects no PII, and surfaces the not-advice framing in its docs.
output: SPARQL endpoint deployment config + query docs, committed via PR.
